DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter Yuan Liu (510-517-3423) Plaintiff in propria persona.
No other appearances.

ARGUED re: service (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TWITTER, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustain without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
